title: The Witness Creator on Science, Language, and Reality
creator: Matt Peckham and Jonathan Blow
description: A post-release interview in which Blow discusses The Witness as nonverbal communication, its deliberately limited interactions, its relationship to Braid, and its interest in perception and truth.
useful: Because it was published after players encountered the finished game, the interview helps compare stated intention with the actual experience and reception of The Witness.

manualLinkStatus.note: TIME interview opened successfully during editorial review.

audience: Players, critics, and developers looking for a concise first-person account of what The Witness was intended to communicate and why its interaction is so constrained.
learning: Relate minimal interaction to nonverbal communication
Compare the design aims of Braid and The Witness
Separate a creator's stated intention from critical interpretation

editorial.note: Verified against the TIME interview page.
